description: Migration: quotes table created with correct columns including is_template boolean, types, and constraints
Migration: quotes table has indexes on (tenant, client_id), (tenant, status), (tenant, quote_number), (tenant, parent_quote_id)
Migration: quote_items table created with correct columns including is_selected, matching invoice_charges pattern plus quote-specific fields
Migration: quote_items FK to quotes cascades on delete
Migration: quote_activities table created with correct columns and FK to quotes
Numbering: 'QUOTE' entity type generates Q-0001 on first call
Numbering: sequential calls generate Q-0001, Q-0002, Q-0003
Numbering: different tenants have independent sequences
Types: IQuote interface includes all required fields with correct types
Types: QuoteStatus includes draft, sent, accepted, rejected, expired, converted, cancelled, superseded
Types: IQuoteListItem includes joined client name and computed display fields
Schema: createQuoteSchema requires client_id, title, quote_date, valid_until
Schema: createQuoteSchema rejects invalid dates (valid_until before quote_date)
Schema: createQuoteItemSchema requires description and validates quantity > 0
Schema: status transition validation allows draft→sent but rejects draft→accepted
Schema: status transition validation allows sent→accepted, sent→rejected, sent→expired, sent→cancelled
Schema: status transition validation allows accepted→converted but rejects converted→draft
Model: getById returns quote with items for correct tenant
Model: getById returns null for wrong tenant (isolation)
Model: getById auto-expires quote if valid_until < today and status is 'sent'
Model: getById does not auto-expire drafts or accepted quotes
Model: getByNumber returns correct quote by human-readable number within tenant
Model: listByTenant returns paginated results with correct total count
Model: listByTenant filters by status correctly
Model: listByTenant filters by client_id correctly
Model: listByTenant sorts by quote_date descending by default
Model: listByClient returns only quotes for specified client
Model: create inserts quote with generated quote_number and logs 'created' activity
Model: create sets default status to 'draft'
Model: update changes fields and logs 'updated' activity
Model: update rejects invalid status transitions
Model: delete removes draft quotes with no business history via deleteEntityWithValidation
Model: delete blocks non-draft quotes and offers archive alternative
Model: delete blocks drafts that have business history (emails sent, etc.) and offers archive
Item model: listByQuoteId returns items ordered by display_order
Item model: create with service_id populates service_name, service_sku, unit_price from catalog
Item model: create without service_id allows custom item entry
Item model: update allows rate override (different unit_price than catalog default)
Item model: delete removes item and adjusts display_order of remaining items
Item model: reorder updates display_order for all items in batch
Activity model: create stores activity with all fields and auto-timestamps
Activity model: listByQuoteId returns activities in chronological order
Action: createQuote requires billing:create permission
Action: createQuote returns quote with generated number
Action: updateQuote enforces status transition rules
Action: deleteQuote rejects deletion of sent/accepted quotes
Action: addQuoteItem with service_id populates defaults from catalog
Action: addQuoteItem with all four billing methods (fixed, hourly, usage, per_unit)
Action: addQuoteItem allows rate override different from catalog default
Action: addQuoteItem stores is_optional=true when flagged
Action: addQuoteItem stores is_recurring=true with billing_frequency
Business template: creating a quote template sets is_template=true and does not generate a quote_number
Business template: createQuoteFromTemplate copies all items from template to new draft quote
Business template: createQuoteFromTemplate generates a new quote_number for the draft
Business template: template list filters by is_template=true, quote list filters by is_template=false/null
Business template: templates are not included in status lifecycle (no sent/accepted/etc.)
Tax: calculateTax called per taxable item with correct net_amount and region
Tax: is_taxable=false items get zero tax_amount
Tax: tax-exempt client gets zero tax on all items
Tax: reverse charge applicable client gets zero tax
Tax: per-item tax_region and tax_rate stored correctly after calculation
Discount: percentage discount calculates correct amount from target item total
Discount: fixed discount stores exact amount as total_price
Discount: applies_to_item_id scopes discount to specific item's net_amount
Discount: applies_to_service_id scopes discount to all items of that service
Discount: quote-level discount (no target) applies to full subtotal
Totals: subtotal equals sum of non-discount item total_prices
Totals: discount_total equals sum of discount line amounts
Totals: total_amount = subtotal - discount_total + tax
Totals: adding an item triggers recalculation of all totals
Totals: removing an item triggers recalculation
Totals: toggling optional item off excludes it from totals
Totals: toggling optional item back on includes it in totals
Versioning: revise creates new quote row with version+1 and parent_quote_id set
Versioning: revise copies all quote_items to new version with new item_ids
Versioning: old version status set to 'superseded' after revision
Versioning: new version has same quote_number as original
Versioning: can revise a rejected quote (creates new version from rejected)
Version history: query returns all versions ordered by version number
Version history: works for quotes with 3+ versions
Template migration: quote_templates table has templateAst JSONB column
Template migration: standard_quote_templates seeded with default and detailed templates
Template migration: standard quote template seed upsert succeeds on repeated runs
QuoteViewModel: correctly maps all quote fields including items with optional/recurring metadata
AST bindings: quoteNumber, quoteDate, validUntil resolve to correct quote values
AST bindings: lineItems collection includes is_optional and is_recurring flags per item
Standard template: 'standard-quote-default' renders valid HTML with all sections
Standard template: 'standard-quote-detailed' renders phase grouping and optional item markers
Adapter: mapDbQuoteToViewModel fetches and joins client, contact, tenant data
PDF: generates valid PDF buffer from quote data
PDF: stores generated file in file storage and returns file_id
Preview: renders quote template in-browser without Puppeteer
Template selection: uses quote-specific template_id if set
Template selection: falls back to tenant default when no per-quote template
Template selection: falls back to standard-quote-default when no tenant default
Send: sendQuote rejects quotes not in draft/approved status
Send: sendQuote generates PDF, sends email to specified address(es), updates sent_at and status to 'sent'
Send: sendQuote accepts array of email addresses and sends to all of them
Send: sendQuote logs 'sent' activity
Email: 'Quote Sent' email includes quote summary and PDF attachment
Email: sent email logged in email_sending_logs with entity_type='quote'
Client portal: QuotesTab loads and displays client's quotes
Client portal: QuotesTab only shows quotes for authenticated client
Client portal: QuoteDetail shows full line items with optional item indicators
Client portal: toggling optional item on/off recalculates displayed total and persists is_selected server-side
Client portal: optional item selections persist across page reloads
Client portal: Accept persists optional item selections and sets accepted_at, accepted_by, status to 'accepted'
MSP detail view: accepted quote with optional items shows client's selections highlighted for review
Client portal: Reject requires comment, sets rejected_at, rejection_reason, status to 'rejected'
Client portal: first view sets viewed_at timestamp and logs activity
Client portal: second view does not overwrite viewed_at
Client portal: cannot accept/reject expired quote
Conversion: Quote→Contract creates draft contract with correct name and dates
Conversion: recurring fixed-price item creates contract_line + _fixed_config
Conversion: recurring hourly item creates contract_line + _hourly_config
Conversion: recurring usage item creates contract_line + _usage_config
Conversion: client_contracts assignment created with correct client and dates
Conversion: converted_contract_id set on quote after contract creation
Conversion: Quote→Invoice creates draft invoice with is_manual=true
Conversion: one-time items mapped to invoice_charges with correct tax/discount data
Conversion: converted_invoice_id set on quote after invoice creation
Conversion: combined conversion creates both contract and invoice in single transaction
Conversion: combined conversion rolls back both if invoice creation fails after contract creation
Conversion: status set to 'converted' after successful conversion
Conversion: preview correctly categorizes items as contract-bound vs invoice-bound
Conversion: optional items with is_selected=false (excluded by client) are not converted
Conversion: post-conversion quote detail shows links to created contract and invoice
Approval: 'Submit for Approval' changes status from draft to pending_approval
Approval migration: quotes status constraint allows pending_approval and approved
Approval: approve changes status from pending_approval to approved
Approval: reject returns quote to draft with comment
Approval: quotes:approve permission required — user without it gets denied
Approval: when disabled per tenant, draft→sent transition allowed directly
Duplication: creates new quote with new number, draft status, copied items
Duplication: duplicated items have new item_ids (not referencing original)
Auto-expiration job: bulk-expires all sent quotes past valid_until
Save as Template: creates business template from existing quote with is_template=true, copies items
Save as Template: template does not copy quote-specific fields (client, contact, dates, status)
